title: Specify the colours used for 'colour by' in calendar
excerpt: My calendar widget that links and displays four boards is using colours that are too close in shade and not very accessible with white font on yellow background. Is there any way to define what colours are used?

posts.author: Kate.wyeth (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml: My calendar widget that links and displays four boards is using colours that are too close in shade and not very accessible with white font on yellow background. Is there any way to define what colours are used?
